title: My Personal Experience with iPad : Updates & Additions
content:
Regarding **page size selection** in Pages app (and Numbers too, I suppose), it turns out I did not look hard enough. See that little page curl on the lower right? It reveals the papar size selection.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l68z0viYP41qzw4y5.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l693shsUVf1qzw4y5.jpg)

As for the issue of **print**, there is an application called [Air Sharing HD](http://itunes.apple.com/th/app/air-sharing-hd/id365541415?mt=8) that allows you to "send" file to and from the iPad via WiFi (web interface).

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6a4uijuSs1qzw4y5.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6a4uuHOtg1qzw4y5.jpg)

It can also connect to FTP server, MobileMe, Dropbox and many cloud storage services.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6a4vh1ZzS1qzw4y5.jpg)

I have no idea what wrong with this one folder on my Dropbox though. I cannot access any file or folder in it. (The white generic icons are folders.)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6a58u5nPX1qzw4y5.jpg)

And lastly, this application can print the document through a share printer in the network! The printer has to be shared from a computer, by the way. It cannot direct connect to a network printer. I suppose it has something to do with printer driver.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6a53moUpU1qzw4y5.jpg)

However, it would be great if Apple could just add the print to shared printer in the next update of iOS for iPad. * hint hint *

One cool application I always want to have my hands on is [Flipboard](http://www.flipboard.com/) and I just received the invitation today.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6d0yaKbTv1qzw4y5.jpg)

It is an alternative way to live your social-networking life and a good one too. Here is the sample from my Twitter feed.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6d13ykCoJ1qzw4y5.jpg)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6d14i0sWT1qzw4y5.jpg)

And last thing I will say to bore you regarding my experience with the iPad is how dirty my fingers are.

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_l6d17f0VSh1qzw4y5.jpg)

My god! This is embarssing. I am going to get the screen protector!

[ And that will be the last of my so-called _review of the iPad_. Back to work for real. ]
